summary: A Go-based assertion runner and MCP server project currently undergoing heavy automated test coverage expansion and schema hardening.
patterns: Test-Driven Development (TDD) via extensive extra tests
concerns: High volume of auto-generated test files (GOrchestra/glm-agents) may clutter the repository
Recent commit indicates 12 missing assertion types in schema export, pointing to schema drift
Mixed git status (modified, staged, untracked) suggests an incomplete commit or merge
Heavy reliance on _extra_test.go files indicates potential gaps in original test suites
suggestions: Consolidate or archive the GOrchestra agent-generated test directories to reduce noise
Implement schema-to-assertion contract tests to prevent future type drift
Resolve the dirty git state before continuing development
Review and integrate valuable extra tests into the primary test files, removing redundant ones
